name: Speed with quality floor
description: Moves quickly while maintaining a reliable quality bar; uses feedback loops and instrumentation to avoid regressions.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Slow cycles, frequent rework due to preventable issues

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Meets pace expectations on known patterns; occasional regressions

levels.label: Strong
behavioral_indicators: Fast iterations; instruments work; minimal regressions

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Consistently ships thin slices rapidly with strong judgment on where precision matters
